description_long: This house features a prominent hip roof with gray shingles and a wide overhang, providing ample shade to the surrounding patio area. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by white columns, a modern entry door with geometric glass panels, and a small pool with a waterfall feature adjacent to the entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and light stone, giving the house a clean, contemporary look. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with double sets on the sides and a single set at the rear, all framed in white. The house sits on a tiled platform that extends around the perimeter, offering outdoor living space. The overall design blends modern and tropical influences, suitable for a suburban or resort-like urban neighborhood.
description: A modern single-story house with a hip roof, covered porch, geometric entry door, and a small pool feature, finished in white and light stone with symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entry door with glass panels, and a small pool with a waterfall feature.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, stone and white wall finishes, and the pool area partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with fewer windows and a solid white wall section, as well as the tiled patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended patio, white-framed windows, and the hip roof's overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, geometric glass-panel door, tiled steps, and a small pool feature adjacent to the entrance.
